subtitle: Community Management Made Simple
description:
MemberCore is the all-in-one platform for managing your organization, fraternity, sorority, club, or community group. Stay connected with real-time chat, manage events, track dues, run polls, and keep your directory organized — all in one place.

Key Features:
• Real-time Chat — Channel-based messaging with reactions, replies, and message pinning
• Events & Calendar — Create events, RSVP, purchase tickets, and check in with QR codes
• Dues & Payments — Track member dues with flexible payment options powered by Stripe
• Directory — Searchable member directory with roles and profiles
• Polls — Create polls and gather votes from your community
• Documents — Share important documents and forms with members
• Push Notifications — Stay updated with instant alerts for messages, events, and more
• Role-Based Access — Owner, Admin, Member, and Restricted roles with granular permissions
keywords: community, organization, fraternity, sorority, club, membership, chat, events, dues, payments, polls, directory

screenshots.note: Generate screenshots using Expo's screenshot tool or manually from simulator. Required sizes: iPhone 6.7", iPhone 6.5", iPad 12.9". Android: phone and 7" tablet.

reviewNotes: Test account credentials will be provided in the App Store Connect submission. The app requires an organization to be created via the web dashboard at https://membercore.app before the mobile experience is fully functional.
